---
title: "Assessment 1 — Solutions"
author: "Generated by assistant"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=4)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
```

## Question 1 — Student record dataset

```{r child='Q1/Question1.Rmd'}
```

## Question 2 — Temperature data (Met Office)

```{r child='Q2/Question2.Rmd'}
```

## Question 3 — Age bins for elected politicians

```{r child='Q3/Question3.Rmd'}
```

## Question 4 — Monthly exchange rates

```{r child='Q4/Question4.Rmd'}
```

---

## Render instructions

To render to HTML from R, run:

```r
rmarkdown::render("R/Assessments/Assessment-1/Assessment-1_solution.Rmd")
```
